what_worked: Detected structural corruption by inspecting raw JSON
what_failed: self-improve-log.json had mixed structure: top-level 'runs' array with 40+ null entries PLUS flat top-level entries
Likely caused by different heartbeat sessions using different append strategies (some wrote flat entries, others wrote into runs[])
lesson: Log files need consistent schema. When multiple sessions write to same JSON log, they must ALL use the same structure. Use a single agreed format: {runs: []} array only. After any write, verify the root key matches expected schema.
